description:
Live voice input based on Mistral Voxtral Voxtral is an Android voice input app that uses Mistral's hosted Voxtral realtime service. It can be used as:
  • a standalone app for live transcription
  • a microphone IME for keyboards such as HeliBoard
  • an Android voice input service for apps that support speech recognition
Important:
  • Voxtral is not offline
  • you need a Mistral API key
  • an internet connection is required during recognition
Features:
  • streaming speech-to-text with live updates
  • optional translation to English
  • copy output from the standalone app
  • optional Chinese simplified/traditional conversion
  • optional text-to-speech playback for translated text in the standalone app
For best results, press and hold the microphone button while speaking clearly.
